programme.desc: A lawyer second-guesses his proposals to both his job and his fiancé while rekindling his love for an old flame.

programme.desc: Polar-opposite publicists are forced to spend Christmas together in Santa Claus, Indiana while writing a story. The focus of their story shifts after learning the historic town is in trouble, so they must put aside their differences and work together.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret
programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Chasing Caribou

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Alaska: Ten Years on the Homestead
programme.desc: The Kilchers look back on the last decade of their lives homesteading in the Alaskan wilderness. From their first moments on camera to never-before-seen footage, the family relives 10 years of danger, adventure and ingenuity on the last frontier.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Alaska: Ten Years on the Homestead

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Whole New Frontier
programme.desc: As spring approaches, the Kilchers prepare for a potentially devastating wildfire season. But when COVID-19 threatens the homestead and crews are evacuated, the family must come together and adapt like never before.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Father-Son Ingenuity
programme.desc: Before the spring thaw floods the area, Atz Sr. and his sons build a bridge across a river using chainsaws and fallen logs. Otto and Eivin create two amphibious crafts from their ATVs. Meanwhile, Atz Lee and Jane build a new smokehouse.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Days Are A-Comin'
programme.desc: With only two weeks left to finish their ambitious self-rescue, Marty races to complete the walls of the log cabin. Misty expands the garden and builds a goat shelter, while Matt takes the next generation on a hunt for gold.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Whole New Frontier
programme.desc: As spring approaches, the Kilchers prepare for a potentially devastating wildfire season. But when COVID-19 threatens the homestead and crews are evacuated, the family must come together and adapt like never before.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Spring Delicacy
programme.desc: Atz Lee and Jane climb reefs to hunt for octopus. Jane must face her fear of heights or be trapped by the tide. Otto struggles to keep a newborn calf alive during the annual spring cattle drive. Eve gives Eivin news that will change the homestead forever.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Stung by a '67 Corvette Stingray

programme.desc: DNA found on a marijuana joint in Florida in 2005 helps to solve the 1988 rape and murder of a California woman. A cold case murder in Illinois heats up when a jailhouse lawyer turns into a jailhouse snitch.

programme.desc: A family torn apart by their grandparents' murders. Two decades later, a cold case detective takes on the case that's haunted him since he was a child. When he breaks the case, he must race to solve it before the family takes matters into their own hands.

programme.desc: A 17-year-old girl goes missing in a small Kentucky town. Two weeks later, she is found strangled in the woods.

programme.desc: New Orleans Detective Ryan Vaught takes on his most challenging case yet when a young married couple goes missing and one of them is found floating in a river, drowned to death.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 2
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 4
programme.desc: You're cordially invited to a one-of-a-kind dinner party at Joe, Q, Murr, and Sal's homes from the comfort of your own.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 5
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 6
programme.desc: The guys put their culinary skills to the test by serving dishes the viewers requested. Plus, find out if Joe grew a mustache.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies

programme.title: Dr. 90210: Summer Body

programme.title: Botched: Four Leeches and a Funeral

programme.title: Botched: House of Horrors

programme.desc: A late night three alarm house fire forces a terrified family out of their home, but Firefighter/ EMT Chris Sanders thinks he sees someone still stuck inside.

programme.title: Paranormal 911: Campus Cult and Eye Contact
programme.desc: A campus police officer and her partner investigate an emergency in the parking lot next to a condemned building, and a firefighter is called to a crash involving a car that he just witnessed pass him.

programme.title: Paranormal 911: Scarred, War House Haunting and Winged Demon
programme.desc: An EMT has a close encounter with the spirit of a car crash victim, a shadowy entity stalks a police officer and her partner while they investigate an abandoned home and a paramedic witnesses a patient's horrific transformation.

programme.title: Paranormal 911: Coffin Corridor
programme.desc: A firefighter experiences ghostly phenomena at a popular amusement park. A police officer encounters a dark entity that may be the cause of multiple fatalities on a notoriously dangerous stretch of highway known as the 'Coffin Corridor.'

programme.title: Paranormal 911: Paranormal Prisoner
programme.desc: A correctional officer witnesses the Grim Reaper collect the soul of a dead prisoner, the ghost of teenage girl attaches herself to the EMT who tried to save her and an elderly man is saved by his recently deceased wife.

programme.title: Paranormal 911: Martin/ He Made Me Do It/ Dark Spirit
programme.desc: A prison guard witnesses a terrifying encounter between an inmate and her dead brother, a paramedic is confronted by the ghost of an elderly patient's past and a state trooper comes face-to-face with a remorseful spirit.

programme.title: Paranormal 911: The Voice
programme.desc: An EMT responds to a call in a home that contains a creepy collection of mannequins, a first responder questions her sanity after hearing the voice of a dead woman and a police officer investigates strange goings-on in an elderly woman's attic.

programme.title: Paranormal 911: Fearful Fed
programme.desc: A Homeland Security officer is left shaken by an encounter with an otherworldly intruder inside an empty government building, a mysterious soldier saves a hospital corpsman's life during a hurricane and paramedics respond to a ghostly 911 call.

programme.title: Paranormal 911: Through the Looking Glass
programme.desc: An officer investigates a mysterious disturbance at a family gathering, a dark presence hitches a ride in a police car after a shooting and a paramedic hears a ghostly argument while answering a call at a recently diseased woman's home.

programme.title: Below Deck: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: Frustrations mount for Rocky over her job and Eddie. Meanwhile, Ben wows charter guests with a steakhouse-style dinner, yet his breakfast dishes fail to measure up, and Rocky divulges details about a secret affair.

programme.title: Below Deck: Loose Lips Sink Ships
programme.desc: The final dinner of the charter season is imperiled when Ben suffers a severe injury and he’s forced to rely on Rocky for help. Captain Lee talks to Connie about her yachting future, and the crew's bonfire gets extremely tense.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Taxing Times and Blurry Lines
programme.desc: Karen invites Gizelle and Ashley to her homecoming in Virginia, but an emotional visit to her childhood farm shows the ladies a different side of the Grande Dame. Robyn's tax woes go public. Candiace considers legal action against Monique.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: 512: Behind The Episode
programme.desc: Follow the upscale lives of six intriguing, well-to-do women in Potomac, Maryland.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: No Shows and Show Downs
programme.desc: Monique invites the ladies to her podcast, but their lack of support leaves her feeling even more isolated. Juan asks Robyn's parents for their blessing to remarry their daughter. Meanwhile, Gizelle and Jamal continue to struggle with their relationship.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: No Shows and Show Downs
programme.desc: Monique invites the ladies to her podcast, but their lack of support leaves her feeling even more isolated. Juan asks Robyn's parents for their blessing to remarry their daughter. Meanwhile, Gizelle and Jamal continue to struggle with their relationship.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: A Country Ghost Town Jamboree
programme.desc: Hold on to your wigs as the Biermanns come face to face with ghouls and ghosts in the most haunted house in the country.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Date Night
programme.desc: The Chrisley kids show their love for their parents by treating them to a special day of pampering and a romantic dinner, but planning isn't the kids' strong suit. What starts off with good intentions ends up in a comedy of errors.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hey Chloe, It's Your Birthday!
programme.desc: Todd bets Julie he can throw just as fabulous a birthday party for Chloe as she could. The bet is on, but Todd has to do it all on his own. He soon realizes that planning cupcakes and a petting zoo is not as easy as Julie makes it look.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules for Dating My Teenage Daughter
programme.desc: When Julie announces she's going back to work, Todd must transform into Mr. Mom and take over the household duties. Meanwhile, Savannah feels like she's ready to start dating and pleads her case to go out with a 19-year-old American Idol.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Misadventures in Babysitting
programme.desc: Todd and Julie head out of town, and leave Chase and Savannah at home to watch Grayson overnight for the first time. They hope they will follow the rules, but Chase and Savannah have plans of their own.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Father's Day
programme.desc: It's Father's Day and the kids try and plan a day for dad, but their bright idea of going to an amusement park backfires, as Todd's competitive side turns their planned day of fun into an all-out competition.

programme.title: Watch What Happens Live

programme.title: Bravo's Chat Room

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show

programme.title: Below Deck: Shut Your Porthole!
programme.desc: Tempers flare on deck as the crew prepares for their first group of charter guests, a larger-than-life group of fun-loving Southerners. A rowdy, randy charter guest wants to get very friendly with new deckhand, Andrew. Kelley and Jennice get flirty.

programme.title: Below Deck: Hex on the Beach
programme.desc: Kate goes increasingly unhappy with Kat's bad attitude and constant complaining. Meanwhile, Andrew hopes to make amends for his mistakes by giving the female guests a special performance on the sky deck. A frightening accident brings the night to a halt.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mojitos Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Kate is annoyed by the new charter guests and their ongoing demands for special attention. Andrew makes a stunning admission to Captain Lee that affects the entire crew. Ben gives a hands-on cooking lesson to his flirty female guests.

programme.title: Below Deck: Charter Guest Soulmate
programme.desc: With some of his crew furious about the distribution of tip money, Captain Lee has to make a decision about how to handle Andrew. Also, Kate is excited about a new charter guest who has very specific requests, but is stunned by an unexpected critique.

programme.title: Below Deck: Bitchy Resting Face
programme.desc: The Ohana crew struggles to pull of an elaborate and elegant 'White Party.' They worry that the combined fury of an angry Mother Nature and an angrier Kate may ruin everything.

programme.title: Below Deck: Strains, Stains and a Big Pain
programme.desc: A night of fun turns sour when Kelly confronts some fellow yachties who insult Amy and Jennice. Ben and Kate struggle to accommodate a returning charter guest and her outspoken, rambunctious family. Kat is blindsided by a surprise visit.

programme.title: Below Deck: She'd Better Not Be Staying
programme.desc: The Ohana crew is very unhappy to learn that Adrienne will be coming onboard as a guest. When Adrienne blows the lid off the lingering tension between Kat and Amy, the boat erupts in total chaos. Meanwhile, Amy feels isolated.

programme.title: Below Deck: New Kid on the Deck
programme.desc: Everybody is happy when the new deckhand, Logan Reese, finally arrives - and once the stews size him up, the fight for his attention is on. Amy has to call for back-up when she’s left alone on late-night service with a throng of hard-partying guests.

programme.title: Below Deck: You're Grounded
programme.desc: After a night of partying, the Ohana crew has to prepare for a new group of charter guests, but simmering tensions between Amy and Kate and a lingering hangover for Kelley complicate everything. Kelley receives a harsh reprimand from Captain Lee.

programme.title: Below Deck: Premature Corkulation
programme.desc: Kelley asks Jennice out on a date, but it doesn’t exactly go according to plan. Meanwhile, the new charter guests turn the Ohana sky deck into a stock trading floor and Logan turns on the charm towards the primary guest’s model girlfriend.

programme.title: Below Deck: Dry Land, Damp Eyes
programme.desc: Tensions within 'Ohana's' crew reach their boiling point as they prepare for the season's final charter. Dean, the recipient of Kate's infamous 'penis blanket' fury, returns as a guest. After returning to port, the crew say their final goodbyes.

programme.title: Movie: The First Purge

programme.desc: Frank and Dave's road trip through Florida gets stranger at every turn, from a creepy collection of kitsch to a tugboat that's home to a captain and his unusual pet. Back in Iowa, Mike readies the new shop for its Grand Opening.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Strike, Spare, BOOM
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars meet a guy who is selling his homemade mortar that fires a very unique brand of ammo- bowling balls.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pedal to the Metal
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars meet a man with a handwritten poem from rock legend Jimi Hendrix. The guys are presented with a chessboard made from the wood of one of the most famous ships in history: the Titanic.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Offer
programme.desc: The guys check out a 1956 Chevy drag racing car. When someone brings in a historic magician's box, the guys learn that cutting Chumlee in half is the easiest part.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Silent But Chumlee
programme.desc: Chumlee is on the hunt for deals when he checks out a Silent Scope sniper arcade game.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn U
programme.desc: A first edition of Mark Twain's 'A Yankee in King Arthur's Court' is brought into the shop. Then, a 1953 Peter Pan animation flies into the shop. Later, Rick takes his business expertise to the classroom.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Who's Your Dali?
programme.desc: A painting from Salvador Dali's Divine Comedy series ascends into the shop. Then, Rick faces an uphill battle when a note signed by Edmund Hillary treks in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Get in the Ring
programme.desc: Memorabilia from undefeated boxing champ Rocky Marciano shows up at the shop. Then, Rick checks out a one-of-a-kind, battery-operated, glow-in-the-dark car. Later, Chumlee uses modern technology to 'tele-presence' into work.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Put Up Your Nukes
programme.desc: A seller claims he has a cover for a thermonuclear warhead. Then, Corey swings into action when a mandolin from Bob Wills' Texas Playboys comes into the shop. Later, Chumlee tries to find something he's better at than Rick.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Tricky Ricky
programme.desc: Go long with the Pawn Stars when a signed jersey from San Diego Chargers quarterback Dan Fouts gets thrown into the shop. Then, Rick tries to learn the trick of the trade when Harry Blackstone's vanishing birdcage appears.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Dodging Dillinger
programme.desc: Bullet shells from John Dillinger's last robbery are brought in to the shop. Then, Rick and Corey try to make a drive-by deal on a vintage Schwinn Whizzer from 1947. Later, Chumlee relives his childhood when a customer brings in a Stretch Armstrong doll.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pinball Punch
programme.desc: Chumlee checks out two classic pinball machines. Then, Rick wings it when he checks out a carrier pigeon capsule from WWII. Later, the guys give Rick a hard time when he decides to take up boxing.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Van Gogh a Go Go
programme.desc: A customer brings in lithographs that are believed to have belonged to Vincent van Gogh. Then, Corey and Chumlee are brought back to their younger days when a vintage skateboard collection comes into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Book of Rick
programme.desc: A guitar pedal that was once used by Kurt Cobain is brought into the shop. Then, a copy of the Book of Mormon from 1842 arrives and could possibly be the most expensive book to ever be in the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Behind the Wheel
programme.desc: A 1923 Babe Ruth baseball card arrives at the shop as well as an unrestored children's tricycle from the 1930s. Later, Corey totals his truck and is forced to drive the company car with Rick's face on it.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: G.I. Pawn
programme.desc: Two rare G.I. Joe playsets, a 1950s Chinese military motorcycle, a photograph and letter signed by poet Henry Wadsworth Longfellow, and an antique Black and Decker drill.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Silver Stash Pawn
programme.desc: A first edition of the Adventures of Bob Hope comic; an ancient Egyptian mummy mask; a 1950s Disney fire extinguisher.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Napoleon Complex
programme.desc: A letter signed by Napoleon, a surreal Pedro Friedeberg figure, a 1960s Monkees talking puppet, and some original 'Dick & Jane' illustrations.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Triple Axel Pawn
programme.desc: Jam out with the Pawn Stars when a custom Fender quad guitar rocks into the shop. Then, a Wheaties box featuring Tonya Harding skates in. Rick feels the weight of it all when he checks out two steelyard scales from the 1700s.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Spider Pawn
programme.desc: Rick looks into the authenticity of a rare 1936 Zippo prototype. Corey's wants to snag an antique rotary phone for the right price. Chumlee meets Marvel Comics creator and legendary writer Stan Lee.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Up, Up and Away

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Beating Columbus
programme.desc: Expert archaeologists investigate the first confirmed Viking settlement in America, and using cutting-edge technology, they're making new discoveries that will change everything we know about American history.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Mystery of the Sea Raiders
programme.desc: Experts investigate a mysterious set of clues that suggest the Vikings could have ventured deeper into North America, and using cutting-edge tech, they put Viking ships to the test to reveal how far they could have gone.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: War in the New World
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that Vikings and Native Americans might have fought a thousand years ago, and using cutting-edge tech, experts put their weaponry and tactics to the test to find out who might have won.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Ghosts of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: A mysterious artifact might be evidence that Vikings reached the American Midwest, and to investigate this controversial theory, archaeologists build a Viking boat to test if their ships could manage a dangerous 1,000-mile journey over the Great Lakes.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Curse of Death Island
programme.desc: A team of expert archaeologists are hot on the trail of the legendary Viking utopia of the Americas, and clues from the ancient Sagas lead them to a mysterious, hostile island with a deadly past.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: The Alaska Enigma
programme.desc: New discoveries suggest that the Vikings of North America didn't just disappear, but might have traveled further into American than anyone ever imagined, and using the latest tech, experts put this shocking theory to the test.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Resurrecting Notre Dame
programme.desc: When catastrophic fires ravaged Notre-Dame in April 2019, one of the world's great wonders was left in ruins. Experts use the latest technology and modern-day science to reveal what it would take to rebuild it a second time.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Doomsday in Venice
programme.desc: Venice is a city in crisis and it took dangerous, cutting-edge engineering to build it. As apocalyptic floodwaters unleash havoc, experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Secrets at the Great Wall
programme.desc: The Great Wall of China is one of the world's greatest engineering marvels, and it took dangerous, cutting-edge construction to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Fortress of the Gods
programme.desc: Rome's Pantheon hides the secret to the Roman Empire's power, and it took dangerous, cutting-edge engineering to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Hunt for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: According to the Bible, Noah's Ark was a world-changing engineering feat, and it took cutting-edge construction to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as difficult.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Rise of the Aqueducts
programme.desc: Rome's aqueducts are one of the greatest engineering marvels in history, and it took dangerous, cutting-edge construction to build them. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building them a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Knew What He Was
programme.desc: Ronald and Patty had always seen the signs that their older brother, Bernard Eugene Giles, had a darker side. When Gene finally lets loose the monster lurking inside, they couldn't help but wonder how things had gone so wrong.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Poisoned by Love
programme.desc: Norma Hawkins grew up in fear of her mother, Shirley Allen. For years, Norma watched in horror while Shirley's anger destroyed those closest to her. But when people started dying, Norma had to find the courage to turn in her own mother to police.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: One of His Women
programme.desc: To the outside world, Aswad Ayinde was a hit music video director. But to his daughter, Aziza Ayinde Kibbibi, he was a repulsive monster who did horrifying things in God's name. After years of suffering, she finally escaped to reveal the truth about him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother's Secrets
programme.desc: Sean Lewis isn't surprised to hear his brother, Patrick, has been arrested again. But this time, Sean learns that every time he had helped his brother get out of some jam he was unwittingly helping a monster continue living a secret double life.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: They Found Them in Storage
programme.desc: When Wilda Gadd married with Howard Willis, she dismissed the rumors about him. Not until she found herself wearing a wire and risking her life to find dismembered bodies did she finally realize the truth: Howard's secret life was darker than any rumor.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Murder of Haley Anderson
programme.desc: When a young nursing student at Binghamton University in New York went missing, her roommates used the app Find My Friends to track her down. What the app led them to launched an international manhunt for her killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Fear Thy Father
programme.desc: Charles Sexton was taught that his father, Eddie, was God. At first, he and his siblings were willing and loyal disciples, but as the family descended into madness, Charles discovered that in the Sexton family, crossing his parents meant death.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: They Found Them in Storage
programme.desc: When Wilda Gadd married with Howard Willis, she dismissed the rumors about him. Not until she found herself wearing a wire and risking her life to find dismembered bodies did she finally realize the truth: Howard's secret life was darker than any rumor.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Trapped in Hell
programme.desc: Lindsay Wrinkles always knew that her father had a short temper, but she never expected to be on the run from him when she was only 14. As she runs from hideout to hideout desperate to evade him, Lindsay wonders what will happen if he ever finds her.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Wedding Day Nightmare
programme.desc: A young woman getting ready to be a bridesmaid at her best friend's wedding is found viciously stabbed to death in her own home.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Unfinished Journey
programme.desc: A young woman about to start a Hollywood career mysteriously disappears off Interstate 10.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Murder in Coralville
programme.desc: A young woman is found shot to death off the side of a dirt road. Police hope their best clue, the bullet found at the scene, will unmask her killer.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Unholy Affair
programme.desc: Life for Syble and Earnie revolves around two things: church and family, but a freak accident and wandering eyes throw the marriage off-kilter, and threatens to drive this couple into an unholy trinity of betrayal, infidelity and murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Country Killer
programme.desc: Rodeo start Matt Allen finds southern comfort in the arms of country girl Elsie Wells. Until she finds his best friend-and they all discover a thick gumbo of trouble.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Deceitful Secrets
programme.desc: Cecil and Larlane Brown have been together for years. But their secrets and lies, ignored and neglected for decades, threaten to turn their 50-year relationship into a bloody battleground.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Flirting With Murder
programme.desc: When Trichele and Brian promise to stick it out for better or for worse, they have no idea how 'worse' things will get. Their passionate love easily flips to bitter hate when the parties, drinking, and recriminations escalate until one of them is dead.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Gambling With The Devil
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her car by her husband and son.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Mommy Dearest
programme.desc: An investigation on the murder of a mother focuses on her violent husband until a jailhouse snitch reveals new information.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Lust for Murder
programme.desc: When Stacie Smith is found dead and an accusation that she has been unfaithful is written on the wall of the crime scene, police believe that a jealous lover is behind her brutal death. But that might just be a ploy to frame the wrong man for the crime.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: While You Were Sleeping
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Wangler and his wife Kathy appear to be living the middle-class dream: two sons, financial security, and a strong faith. But on September 4th, 2006, their façade falls down around them as a cold pre-meditated execution tears their family apart.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Area 52
programme.desc: Few have ever heard about the ultra top-secret military base in the remote deserts of Utah known as Area 52.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: Air Aces: Red Tails
programme.desc: Pressure from African-American activist groups pushed President Roosevelt to initiate a Blacks-only fighter pilot training program during WWII.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From a Train Caboose into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: Hosts Mike and Robert salvage conductor chairs from a train caboose. The whole crew then picks through the Old Cold Storage warehouse in Arrington, VA. Back at the shop, Mike and Tay work together to build a large iron table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: North Carolina Pick and Haul
programme.desc: The gang travel to North Carolina in hopes of salvaging a Mediterranean-style mansion in Charlotte and an iconic sign in Raleigh. Though many of the items have been set aside, loading stone tubs and three-tier chandeliers presents its own challenges.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Barnesville House
programme.desc: The dawgs tackle Ohio's cold and snowy winter to salvage an old Italiante house that's beaming with character. Back in the shop, things heat up as Tay comes up with a plan to use old pulleys as the legs for a unique table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From Columbus, Ohio Into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: The guys tackle disassembling a 40 foot Eiffel Tower replica in Columbus. While there, they meet a fellow salvager and pick through his collection. Grayson also builds a floor lamp with salvaged materials back at the warehouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Wayne Lanes Bowling Alley
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs go to Wayne Lanes in Waynesboro, VA, to salvage bowling balls, bowling pins, bowling shoes and whatever else they can find in the alley. Robert is determined to redeem himself from last season's bowling fiasco.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Little Chef Diner
programme.desc: The Dawgs stay in Roanoke to salvage an old diner sign. The crew also picks through a huge warehouse in Greensboro, NC. Back at the shop, the Whiteside family works together to build a clock from road signs.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Reel Theatres
programme.desc: The crew salvages a movie theater, and find analog projectors, neon letters and more.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Old Robeson County Jail
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the Dawgs salvage a 1950s jail in Lumberton, NC. Key items include a holding cell, sinks, and slate countertops. At the shop, Mike and Tay build a bar from bowling alley flooring.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Roanoke Fire Station #1
programme.desc: Robert takes the Dawgs downtown to salvage a historic firehouse that is being transformed into a restaurant and brewery. Later, Mike and Tay visit an antique shop in hopes of picking up some parts for a commission build.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Firehouse Number 7
programme.desc: Firefighters ask the Dawgs to salvage what they can from their old fire house, and the team works with them to incorporate the materials into a new facility. Then, the guys heads to Highpoint, NC, to fill up their trucks with international treasures.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Texas-Sized Renovation On South Padre Island
programme.desc: A couple and their four kids are looking for a vacation retreat on South Padre Island in Texas. After recently renovating a rental property in the area, they've decided they are ready to get their hands dirty again.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Westport Wonder
programme.desc: An outdoor enthusiast couple loves spending time at the beach in Westport, WA, and decide to buy a vacation home. The house they choose needs a major overhaul, but their limited budget may prevent their planned renovation.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Coastal Cottage in Hampton, Virginia
programme.desc: A couple that dreams of raising their two sons along the shores of Hampton, Virginia, finds a waterfront property in need of serious updating.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Texas Transformation in Port Aransas
programme.desc: A woman and her kids have been vacationing in Port Aransas, TX, for years and are ready to own a piece of their favorite paradise.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: On the Hunt for a St. Pete Beach Retreat in Florida
programme.desc: After vacationing in St. Pete Beach, Florida, for many years, a couple purchases an older condo in a prime location that needs a total gut job. Managing a long-distance project from their home in New York poses a challenge, as does the budget.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Worcester, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb lands in Worcester, MA, where he slurps down some radical ramen, indulges in peanut butter cup French toast and takes on a rack of deep-fried ribs with the heat of a million Scoville units.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Baltimore, MD
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epic eating expedition brings him to Baltimore for an out-of-this-world diner, a classic crab feast and a four-pound pho fight.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Bring the Heat
programme.desc: In Casey's years of facing off against food, he's taken on his fair share of heat. Casey's counting down the hottest, culminating in a challenge so spicy it may crack the Scoville scale and the number.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sensational Seafood
programme.desc: Armed with a serious love of food and years of experience in the restaurant business, Casey Webb travels the country in search of America's most delicious dishes and ultimate eating challenges.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Zacho Libre
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Charlotte, Mich. for the Eaton County Fair, where he takes a swing at the PB battered burger, then goes coco-nutty for the pina colada shrimp tacos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: When Harry Met Salad
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is the Wayne County Fair in Richmond, Ind., where he takes a stroll with the Walking BBQ, feels the groove of the King with a bacon PB&J quesadilla, goes healthy-ish with a deep fried salad.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dawn of the Bread
programme.desc: Noah Cappe cruises up the west coast, starting at the Columbia County Fair in St. Helens, Ore. First up is a traditional Indian fry bread stuffed with some non-traditional ingredients, then Noah dives into the coastal fusion of the great Pacific pita.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts at the Delaware State Fair, where he'll eat the very stately Delaware Dog, a hot dog loaded with scrapple. Then, he'll try to tackle the funnel cake-filled Frankenfunnel Burger and the octopus-loaded Octotaco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe looks east for inspiration as he explores Asian flavours on the fairgrounds. From classic foods like shrimp fried rice balls at the Pacific national exhibition and the spicy Kaprao burger.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Dining
programme.desc: Noah Cappe visits two fall-tastic fairs for seasonal carnival treats. Fright Nights in West Palm Beach, Florida has some scarily delicious items.

programme.desc: We're tracking down the crunchiest, flakiest and noisiest favorite foods in New York.

programme.desc: Jeff Mauro, Geoffrey Zakarian, Jamika Pessoa and Bobby Flay are just a few of your favorite food personalities sharing their all-time favourite ways to indulge in some cheesy goodness.

programme.desc: We're honoring the all-time favorite sandwiches in the 'Sandwich Hall of Fame,' because it's all about the bread and what's in between! If you've never had a BL'G'T, Eddie Jackson will tell you where to go.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gargoyle Gals/ Supermarket Scandal
programme.desc: To impress her new friend, Tilly claims she saw stone gargoyles come to life.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Shut-In!

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Star Wars

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Terrifying Tri-State Trilogy of Terror

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Wedding Date

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Reunion
programme.desc: An executive discovers an unusual Christmas surprise when she inherits her aunt’s hometown bakery. The real surprise comes when she learns the other half of the bakery was left to her long-ago boyfriend.

programme.title: Movie: Becoming Santa
programme.desc: Holly has never introduced her toy designer boyfriend Connor to her family and has only revealed that they live 'up north.' Holly knows she can't wait any longer and decides to bring Conner to meet her parents for Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: The Flight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Stephanie is crushed when her boyfriend breaks up with her just before the holiday season. Heartbroken and homeless she decides to fly home, but the red eye flight on Christmas Eve is diverted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: Summer Of Terror (Part 1)
programme.desc: The summer of 1985 was one of the hottest Los Angeles had seen in a century. But terrified residents weren't sleeping with the windows open, they weren't sleeping at all. A killer was on the loose. He was the Night Stalker.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: I WIll Be Avenged (Part 2)
programme.desc: A tip from a teenage boy leads to the identity of the Night Stalker. Twenty-four hours later a mob of angry citizens track him down and capture him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises
programme.desc: A tape recorded by a popular gym teacher before his own death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: A Canadian financier assumes the name of a co-worker as part of a money-laundering scheme. The man turns up dead in the ocean, with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Eat or Be Eaten
programme.desc: Stranded in the Zambezi River Basin, Grady and Bill are surrounded by Africa's fiercest, during the dry season, when every creature is competing to find sufficient water and sustenance.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Scorched Earth
programme.desc: Stranded in the Namib Desert of southern Africa, Grady and Bill rely on the resources of a broken down car for fire, shelter, and to signal for rescue. Without water, they're forced to recycle fluids to rehydrate and illness threatens to finish Grady.

programme.title: Dual Survival: On Thin Ice
programme.desc: Exposed on jagged granite peaks, in heavy snow and above tree line, Grady and Bill fight the bitter cold of Idaho's Sawtooth Mountains. Here, Mother Nature throws a series of roadblocks at the pair, and a rookie mistake could end their journey.

programme.title: Dual Survival: High and Dry
programme.desc: Bill and Grady take on Oregon's rocky and arid canyon lands. The duo is tested by the desert environment, lack of resources, and exposure in a place where only big horn sheep, mountain lions, and bears call home.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Cuban Crisis
programme.desc: Closed to Americans for over 55 years, Cuba is the site of Grady and Bill's journey through uncharted territory. Here, they face-off against crocodiles, navigate tangled mangroves, fight dehydration, and struggle to get out of the water and find rescue.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Road to Nowhere
programme.desc: In the isolated woods of Northern Maine, Cody and Dave take on the role of two travelers, lost and out of gas on an abandoned logging road. Their only resource is a broken down truck which they pillage for all it's worth including a can of dog food.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Up the River
programme.desc: In Kentucky, Dave and Cody take on a scenario of two kayakers who are dumped into the cold river just a few hours before sundown. To make things worse, they become separated from each other by two miles of rushing river. Then, Dave traps an irate skunk.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Hippo Island
programme.desc: In Botswana's Okavango Delta, Dave and Cody seek to escape the dangerous and deadly hippo-infested marshland using only a dying GPS and waterlogged binoculars.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Thrill of the Hunt
programme.desc: A horse gets tangled in electric wire. Eivin and Levi go rock climbing to secure access to a valuable new hunting ground. Atz Sr. takes Bonnie on a hunting date.

programme.desc: Otto and August radio Eivin for rescue after facing an emergency at sea. Atz Senior must decide between life on the Yuletide and returning to the family homestead. Atz Lee puts Jane's homesteading skills to the test with a wilderness scavenger hunt.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: High and Dry
programme.desc: With the Constructor dead in the water, it's up to Otto and his crew of family and friends to save the invaluable boat for future use. Eivin takes novice hunter Levi on a last chance hunt to Shuyak Island to stockpile deer meat for winter.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Whole New Frontier
programme.desc: As spring approaches, the Kilchers prepare for a potentially devastating wildfire season. But when COVID-19 threatens the homestead and crews are evacuated, the family must come together and adapt like never before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: All the Wrong Moves
programme.desc: What prop does Murr carry almost daily? Which Jokers danced in their high school musical?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Welcome to Miami
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joke and Dagger
programme.desc: The guys crash a gallery opening where their antics aren't appreciated, they pass bizarre judgment on unsuspecting grocery shoppers, and the loser takes a spin on a terrifying wheel where one wrong move could have deadly consequences.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cruisin' for a Bruisin'
programme.desc: The guys hit the seas for a special cruise episode. They turn the pool deck into a playground, give misinformation while posing as entertainment directors, and two Jokers get a double dose of torture in a two-part punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Find out if any of the Jokers are avid skiers, and how the maître d' helped when seating patrons. Also, learn why Joe had a hard time escaping the giant cake.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Why the slow-moving line at The Fast and the Furious ride made things harder for the guys, who officiated Joe's wedding, and why last-minute changes were needed for Murr's Tumblr punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Show Some Respect

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Demo Crazy

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Made Me Laugh

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Might be Trippin'
programme.desc: Filling in as a karate instructor, Michael disrupts the Zen of his student with skills that literally lift him off the ground. Then, at a toy store, Michael's frog necklace is so fashionably realistic that it has one little girl begging for a new pet.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: An Awogami Is Ripe
programme.desc: Michael works at a camping store where his life-saving s'mores and pop-up coolers stun would-be glampers. Later, at a health food store, a child safety pill bottle with built-in invisibility proves too complicated for adults.

programme.title: NCIS: The Good Samaritan
programme.desc: Gibbs and his team hunt for a serial killer after three Naval officers are murdered.

programme.title: NCIS: Sub Rosa
programme.desc: Gibbs and Todd board a submarine when they suspect that there is an impostor on board.

programme.title: NCIS: Minimum Security
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team travel to Cuba to investigate the death of a translator.

programme.title: NCIS: Marine Down
programme.desc: Following her husband's wake, a widow receives a call from him saying he's alive.

programme.title: NCIS: Left for Dead
programme.desc: A woman who digs herself out of a grave after being buried alive comes to Gibbs attention.

programme.title: NCIS: Eye Spy
programme.desc: A naval officer, who was hired by an outside agency to test a product, is found murdered.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Personal
programme.desc: Deek's morning routine is disrupted when he is shot during a convenience store robbery, leaving the team to investigate whether he was the assailants' intended target.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Harm's Way
programme.desc: Sam resumes a former alias and boards a flight to Yemen, in the hopes of tracking down a terrorist group's leader and rescuing the hostage son of a Saudi Prince.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Enemy Within
programme.desc: NCIS investigates whether the life of a Venezuelan politician is in danger after a navy intelligence commander, who is responsible for tracking his moves, suddenly disappears.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: A Person of Interest
programme.desc: Detective Goren is pushed into the headlines when he is blamed for a scientist's suicide.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Zoonotic
programme.desc: The murder of a crooked cop puts the detectives on the trail of a germaphobic doctor.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Blind Spot
programme.desc: When the brutally beaten body of a former ambassador's daughter is found in her uptown home, Detectives Goren and Eames question her jealous ex-boyfriend. However, it soon becomes apparent that they may be dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Seven Indictments
programme.desc: When a charred body is found in a torched house, Intelligence must work to identify the victim, as well as a young boy who is found badly injured inside. As they work towards identifying the victim, they uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Favor, Affection, Malice or Ill-Will
programme.desc: When Lindsay is tipped off about a grieving father looking to avenge his daughter's death, Olinsky goes undercover as a hitman-for-hire. Meanwhile, Ruzek comes back after finishing his undercover assignment, only to have Voight knock him down to patrol.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Emotional Proximity
programme.desc: Olinsky's daughter remains in critical condition following a massive fire, leaving Intelligence on edge, but more determined than ever to track down the suspect.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Remember the Devil
programme.desc: After being tipped off about a woman running barefoot through the woods, Intelligence is led to a kidnapping victim locked up in a shipping container.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Little Bit of Light
programme.desc: When Chicago's 'Nightcrawler' Bobby Trent is murdered over a single piece of footage, Intelligence must investigate one of Chicago's wealthiest families, uncovering a lineage of old money and secrets.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Last Minute Resistance
programme.desc: After encouraging her sister to spend a night out with friends, Burgess wakes up to find that Nicole never made it home. As the guilt begins to eat at Burgess, the team in Intelligence bands together to find Nicole.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Grasping for Salvation
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a teenage boy, Voight finds a connection to an old case. The victim's father, a prominent defense attorney, tries to get the case taken over by Area Central Homicide.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fagin
programme.desc: The team is called to an in-progress bank robbery and find a detective trying to take over the crime scene. As the robberies continue to be executed around the city, Lindsay is forced to make a decision in the heat of the moment.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Army of One
programme.desc: A live video is streamed online showcasing a tortured man being beaten and burned alive. Upon further investigation, the victim's identity is traced back to that of a man who had been locked up for statutory rape.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fork in the Road
programme.desc: When Lindsay receives a panicked phone call from her mother, Bunny, whose boyfriend has just been shot, Lindsay must figure out the best way to approach the situation as her mother is now the main suspect.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Reform
programme.desc: The district is in a state of change, Lindsay has moved to New York and the CPD is under scrutiny about the corrupt nature of its institution. The team attempts to bust a gun deal that quickly turns dicey when innocent people get involved.

programme.title: Movie: The Dark Tower
programme.desc: A gunslinger locked in eternal battle with a sorcerer over the fate of all worlds has his mission interrupted when he meets a boy from Earth. Their conflict spills onto the streets of New York City where the two men clash in a battle of good versus evil.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror III
programme.desc: Bart receives an evil talking Krusty doll as a present and later raises the dead.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XII
programme.desc: Marge orders a futuristic home; a gypsy curses Homer; the kids attend a school of magic.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XIII
programme.desc: Homer discovers that his new hammock can create clones; Marge is transformed into a cat.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVI
programme.desc: Mr. Burns invites Homer and his friends to his big estate for a hunting tournament, but Homer and the gang learn they are the ones being hunted. The Simpsons adopt David, an artificial robot son, after Bart falls into a coma.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVII
programme.desc: A meteor falls to Earth and reveals a green goo that Homer mistakes for marshmallow. Bart brings Golem to life and forces him to carry out his bidding. A radio broadcast convinces the people of Springfield that they're in the midst of an alien invasion.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XX
programme.desc: Lisa is livid with Miss Hoover and, in a series of homages to classic Hitchcock stories, she sets out for deadly revenge. Krusty's fast-food sandwich transforms news anchor Kent Brockman into an enraged zombie. Also, Homer is impaled in Moe's tavern.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXI
programme.desc: Marge, worried about the effects of excessively violent video games, encourages Bart and Milhouse to give wholesome, classic board games a shot. Then, Lisa likes a boy who happens to be a vampire.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXIII
programme.desc: A Mayan Homer and Marge are witnesses to the prediction that 2012 will be the end of the world, the Springfield Subatomic Supercollider creates a black hole that terrorizes the city and Bart travels back in time to 1974.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXIV
programme.desc: Homer rides around Springfield wreaking havoc as 'The Fat in The Hat' in a rhyming Dr. Seuss-ian tale. In 'Dead and Shoulders,' Bart is beheaded during a kite accident and his head is attached to Lisa's body.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXV
programme.desc: On the annual spooktacular Halloween special, Bart and Lisa are transported to a demon-filled alternate universe after Bart reads a set of Aramaic symbols he finds on the underside of his desk.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXVIII
programme.desc: Maggie becomes possessed by an ancient demon, Lisa discovers a creepy yet perfect version of her family in an alternate universe and Homer cannibalizes himself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXIX
programme.desc: Homer wins an oyster-eating contest against the mythical Cthulhu, Springfield is overrun by plant body-snatchers, Lisa finally snaps and Mr. Burns opens a retirement home with some Jurassic upgrades.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Sweet Dee Has a Heart Attack
programme.desc: After Dee suffers a heart attack, she and Dennis try to live a healthier lifestyle. Charlie and Mac join the corporate work force to get health insurance.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Cracks the Liberty Bell
programme.desc: To make the bar a landmark, the gang tells how Paddy's Pub cracked the Liberty Bell.

programme.desc: To make their own dreams come true, the gang gives an unlucky family a home makeover.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Nightman Cometh
programme.desc: Charlie, with the help of the rest of the gang, stages a rock opera based on his song 'Nightman.'

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bull-Whipped
programme.desc: Cesar travels to Santa Barbara to meet Hugo, a 3-year-old bulldog with a mean streak. After a full day with him, Cesar realizes there is no quick fix for Hugo's aggression so it's off to rehab at Cesar's Dog Psychology Center.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Why Dogs Fight
programme.desc: Cesar reveals how dogs communicate through their energy and body language, to help resolve a potentially disastrous situation.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Mascot Mayhem
programme.desc: A hyper dog is made into an exemplary mascot with Cesar's help.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Mess Is More
programme.desc: Look back at the messiest cases the docs at Pol Veterinary Services have encountered!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Riddle Moo This
programme.desc: Inexplicable, puzzling, even shocking-there’s no case too mysterious for Dr. Pol!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Jack Russell the Ripper
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and his team are facing the most bizarre and weird cases this week.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Whole Kitten Ca-Poodle
programme.desc: A look back at some of the doc's most rambunctious canine and feline cases.

programme.title: World's Weirdest: Extremities
programme.desc: Showcasing some of the strangest, most shocking animal appendages on the planet, and uncover their evolutionary advantages.

programme.title: World's Weirdest: Freaky Feeding
programme.desc: Outrageous and downright shocking, get ready for the grossest gourmet nature has to offer.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Battle of Brooklyn Bridge
programme.desc: Experts use the latest technology, and modern-day science to reveal if building possibly the most important bridge in the world, New York's Brooklyn Bridge, a second time would be just as deadly as the first time.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Ghosts of the Colosseum
programme.desc: Rome's Colosseum is the most famous stadium on the planet, and it took cutting-edge engineering and a fallen emperor to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as difficult.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Secrets in the Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's Great Pyramid is one of the world's greatest and most mysterious marvels, and using cutting-edge tech and the latest engineering innovations, experts reveal what it would take to build the ancient wonder today.

programme.title: Unearthed: City of Monsters
programme.desc: Mysterious ruins across the Mediterranean landscape reveal the truth behind the heroes and monsters in the ancient world; experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover buried chambers and maze-like passages that expose how hidden secrets destroyed an empire.

programme.title: Unearthed: City of Monsters
programme.desc: Mysterious ruins across the Mediterranean landscape reveal the truth behind the heroes and monsters in the ancient world; experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover buried chambers and maze-like passages that expose how hidden secrets destroyed an empire.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Enigma of The Giants
programme.desc: Abnormally large bones unearthed from an elaborate network of caves fails to align with the known progress of human evolution.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Stone Age
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal secrets and ritual of the people who build the world's largest stone circle.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Troy
programme.desc: The legendary lost city at the center of the Trojan War is Troy, but its existence has never been confirmed. Now, discoveries and cutting-edge science might prove if this place existed, and if the Greeks really conquered it with the infamous Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Enigma of The Giants
programme.desc: Abnormally large bones unearthed from an elaborate network of caves fails to align with the known progress of human evolution.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Stone Age
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal secrets and ritual of the people who build the world's largest stone circle.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for the Real Atlantis
programme.desc: A mysterious ruined city in Greece is the home of the mythical Labyrinth and the Minotaur, and its catastrophic downfall might have inspired the legend of Atlantis. New discoveries at this site reveal a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Wild West Apocalypse
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to a massive military site that was once a hotbed for nuclear testing, a top secret airbase hidden inside a mountain, and an otherworldly power plant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Doomsday at Dragon's Teeth
programme.desc: Eerie ghost ships stranded in an alien desert, sinister ruins known as the Dragon's Teeth, and a ghostly complex with a bloody past are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Ghost Town
programme.desc: Revisit a Soviet megastructure, a massive Nazi brainwashing complex, and a dangerous desert pass to find out how they were built and why they were mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Haunted Prison
programme.desc: A mysterious American pyramid built out of Cold War paranoia, a haunted prison, and a strange cluster of structures in the Atlantic are mysterious deserted engineering projects are investigated.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Amazon Ghost Town
programme.desc: An American ghost town in the Amazon jungle, a secret Nazi base, and a deadly concrete fortress 866 miles long are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Ark of the Convenant
programme.desc: The Biblical mystery of the whereabouts of the Ark of the Covenant is unravelled on a quest across continents. Believed to be the throne of God himself, the search for the Ark leads us to where many are convinced is its current resting place, Ethiopia.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasures of Petra
programme.desc: It is one of the great wonders of the ancient world, but there is little information on who built the magnificent city of Petra in Jordan and why. See what treasure remains buried there and the dark secrets that remain in this mysterious place.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Oracles of the Dead
programme.desc: The Oracles were thought to be young women of the underworld who were consulted by ancient Greek society, and their visions helped shape the course of history. Find the truth behind their extraordinary trances and apparent psychic powers.

programme.title: Forbidden History: In Search of King Arthur
programme.desc: The legend of King Arthur is one of a courageous fighter and leader in battle, but for centuries, the fabled king has been a mystery to historians. Find out if his story of Camelot, Excalibur and Guinevere just an elaborate fairytale.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Secrets of the Illuminati
programme.desc: Discover the secrets of the mysterious group known as 'The Illuminati,' and where they operate from. Find out if they are really some secret world government operating in the shadows, or if they're just one huge conspiracy.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Pyramid Code
programme.desc: Ancient pyramids are among the greatest wonders of the world and exist across many civilizations. Explore the origins of these structures as experts question if they were independently constructed or perhaps the design of something more mysterious.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Love Sick
programme.desc: In 2014, police are called to a lifeless body in a trailer in Winona, Missouri. The owners, Jason and Stephanie McClurg, have suffered a series of misfortunes which have put their marriage under enormous pressure. But nobody expected it to lead to murder.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Don't Shoot!
programme.desc: In 2015 in Newaygo County, Michigan, Marty and Glenna Duram are found gunned down in their own home. At the heart of the crime is their marriage. It's a bizarre story that involves drugs, stolen money, and a pet parrot who is an eyewitness.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Bye Bye Baby
